checks.description: Observe that legal input changes are reflected on the observable outputs without state dependence.
notes: Combinational functional oracle stays descriptive and avoids inventing a full truth table.
checks.pass_condition: Observable outputs respond consistently to the applied inputs without relying on hidden state or exact-cycle timing.
checks.trigger_condition: When the linked basic stimulus applies legal representative input patterns.

checks.description: Observe stable, externally consistent response to boundary-value input patterns.
notes: Boundary oracle is value-oriented but intentionally generic.
checks.pass_condition: Boundary-value outputs remain externally consistent and do not require hidden state or fixed-latency interpretation.
checks.trigger_condition: When the linked edge case applies zero-like, one-like, or width-boundary patterns.

checks.description: Guardrail: avoid fixed-cycle expectations unless the contract later proves them.
notes: Default property oracle protects against over-specific later render behavior.
checks.pass_condition: The oracle only requires conservative, externally visible progress or stability and forbids hidden exact-cycle assumptions.
checks.trigger_condition: Whenever the linked case evaluates externally visible progress.
